name: Myanmar civil war
primary_actor: Tatmadaw (military junta) / People's Defence Force / EAOs
summary: Following the 2021 coup, the junta has repeatedly imposed nationwide internet shutdowns and forces all traffic through state-controlled MPT (AS9988) for surveillance. Mytel (AS135522) is partly owned by the junta-aligned military.
